privacy_boundary: Contains only public repository configuration, abstract hostname candidates, commit identifiers, and evidence-state metadata. No private chat, health data, credentials, payment logic, diagnosis, or treatment claims are included.
limits: A conventional hostname candidate is not deployment evidence.
Search-engine non-discovery is not proof of DNS failure or nonexistence.
Source readback is not runtime test execution.
No peer execution is claimed without separate evidence.
